currentFocus: Public main is consolidated; the next executable baton is a public-candidate/curated-export wording classification slice from main with docs-only correction authority if one stale non-validation issue is proven.

currentTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo remains the primary collaboration repo for source, docs, tools, tests, RE notes, wave notes, state batons, agent reports, readiness notes, and compact proof summaries that are non-secret and non-payload.
currentTruth.claimBoundary: State refresh and next-baton docs only; no product source, product tests, runtime behavior, patch semantics, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, Host/Join capability, runtime proof, release/publication action, Ghidra mutation, hard-payload boundary, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation changed.
currentTruth.productBaseline: WinUI 3 remains the primary app, AppCore remains shared correctness logic, the C# CLI remains a support lane, and Python tooling remains repo/lab support.

runtimeBoundaries.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint and source-bound copied-runtime proof exists
runtimeBoundaries.staticReClosure: static closure is not runtime, gameplay, visual, online, rebuild, or parity proof

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: Hard payloads, raw proof logs, screenshots/frame dumps, copied executable output, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env files, local config, caches, and build/package output stay out of git and release ZIPs; use LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md for local-only placement.

activeSlice.name: public-candidate-legacy-wording-map
activeSlice.goal: from consolidated main, classify legacy public-candidate and curated-export wording in front-door/release-readiness docs, preserving intentional validation-template names and editing only one clearly stale docs-only wording issue if proven
activeSlice.claimBoundary: docs/release-readiness wording only; no package script, product code, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA claim changes

validation.currentStateRefresh: Validate with JSON parsing, stale-reference scan, docs/repo hygiene gates, public allowlist, hard-payload safety, and git diff checks.
validation.nextSlice: Use docs/state gates for documentation-only cleanup and add the relevant WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any code or UI behavior change.

nextSteps: Start from clean consolidated main and re-read current front-door docs, release readiness pointers, goal.md, and state batons.

Use rg to classify legacy public-candidate and curated-export wording in README.RELEASE.md, RELEASE_SCOPE_AND_TEST_COMMANDS.md, tools/README.md, roadmap/repo-structure-and-archive-map.md, and release/readiness reference files.
Preserve active validation-template and allowlist names when they are intentional compatibility surfaces.
Keep package scripts, product behavior, patch rows, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, music, online gates, runtime proof, release packaging, and installed-game mutation rules out of scope.
